message:
fix(inode): add missing FsGeometry fields and clamp encode_extra_timestamp nsec

Add desc_size and feature_ro_compat to FsGeometry struct literals in
test code to fix build regression after the struct gained new required
fields.

Clamp encode_extra_timestamp nanosecond input to 999_999_999 before
the left-shift to prevent bit-shift overflow on out-of-range values
that could silently corrupt the extra timestamp epoch bits.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
